title: Debug an Intermittent Failure
description: Track down a bug that only happens sometimes.
content:
This fails only sometimes: {{symptom}}

Intermittent means timing, ordering, state, or external dependency. Help me make it reproducible: what to vary (load, concurrency, ordering, slow network) to raise the failure rate, and what to log so a rare failure leaves enough evidence. Identify whether it smells like a race, a resource limit, a dependency flake, or uninitialized state. Tell me how to confirm which, then fix the cause rather than adding a retry.
